approach: Explored the event model slice.json for funddeposit to understand the command (DepositFund), event (FundDeposited), and readmodel (FundsView). Discovered that many files were already partially scaffolded: the FundDeposited event class, FundsView and SliceStateDepositFund views (with state/handlers), the command interface, gwts predicate (amountCannotBeLessThanZero), commandHandler, and REST endpoint all pre-existed. Created the missing adapter.ts to wire the command handler to the stream factory via CommandHandlerOrchestratorFactory. Created fundDepositedMessages.ts to emit a FundDeposited outbox message and an idempotency message. Updated index.ts to import and pass fundDepositedMessages to the FundDeposited event type registration. The routes.ts was already updated to include POST /deposit wired to createDepositFundRestAdapter.
